title: Trichosalpinx podoglossa
taxonomy: Trichosalpinx podoglossa is a species of orchid in the genus Trichosalpinx. The genus Trichosalpinx belongs to the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, which is part of the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Further classification places Trichosalpinx within the tribe Epidendreae. The family Orchidaceae is a part of the order Asparagales, which is a larger group of flowering plants. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics among these plant groups.
